description: Common behavioral interview questions mapped to competencies

questions.question: Tell me about a time you took ownership of a project beyond your normal responsibilities
Describe a disagreement you had with a colleague. How did you handle it?
follow_ups: What was the root cause of the disagreement?
How did you reach a resolution?

questions.question: Tell me about a time you failed. What did you learn?
follow_ups: How has this changed your approach?

questions.question: Describe a situation where you had to make a decision with incomplete information
follow_ups: How did you gather more information?

questions.question: Tell me about the most challenging technical problem you've solved
follow_ups: How did you approach the solution?

questions.question: Describe a time you had to influence others without direct authority
Tell me about a time you went above and beyond for a user or customer
follow_ups: How did you identify their need?

questions.question: Describe a time you delivered under a tight deadline
follow_ups: What did you learn about working under pressure?

questions.question: Tell me about a time you mentored or developed someone
follow_ups: How did you approach the mentoring?
What was the outcome for them?

questions.question: Describe a process or system you improved
follow_ups: How did you identify the problem?
